Interface IWorkspaceName2

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase

ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to members that supply workspace name information.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("05FC30E9-3007-11D4-8140-00C04F686238")]
public interface IWorkspaceName2 : IWorkspaceName
